explanation: Context Precision: fraction of retrieved chunks that are golden.
Context Recall (Hit@k): fraction of golden chunks retrieved.
Normalized DCG@k: rank-aware retrieval quality, golden nearer top scores higher.
Citation F1: harmonic mean of citation precision and recall.
Answer Correctness: required phrases present / token-F1 vs gold answer.
Refusal accuracy: fraction of correct refuse/answer decisions.
Hallucination Rate: fraction of answers unsupported by context (lower better).
Latency: mean retrieval + generation time per query (seconds).
Mean estimated context tokens sent to the LLM (~4 chars/token).
Weighted composite of AC, CIF1, REC, COPG, RR, (1-HR); mean +/- 95% CI over N_RUNS.
